title: Electroloon escape roll removes stun on 1-2

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: All creatures on the opposing side of the field are stunned and cannot inflict Atk damage. At the beginning of their turn, they may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-2, this effect ends.

plan.title: Electroloon escape roll removes stun on 1-2
plan.summary: Start the affected player turn with Electroloon stun active, force a successful effect roll, and verify the stun ends.

notes: Pre-place Electroloon on player_1 field and a stunned opposing creature on player_2 field.
At the beginning of player_2 turn, roll 1 die; 1-2 ends Electroloon stun.

steps: Apply Electroloon stun to the affected creature.
Begin player_2 turn and resolve the forced escape roll.
Verify the stun is removed after the 1 result.

expectedAssertions.label: Stun is removed after successful escape roll

manualVerification: Also verify a failed 3-6 roll leaves the Electroloon stun active.
riskNotes: The setup requires an existing source-linked Electroloon stun before the turn-start roll.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_006_electroloon-006-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
